title: FCDO annual statement of compliance with the Concordat to Support Research Integrity 2024 to 2025
body: "This statement of compliance outlines the FCDO’s annual account of research integrity standards. It covers governance mechanisms, quality assurance processes, and specific actions taken in 2024 to 2025 to ensure all FCDO-funded research meets the standards set out in the Concordat to Support Research Integrity. "
